/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib -o libosc.dylib -install_name @rpath/libosc.dylib CMakeFiles/osc.dir/osc_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osc.dir/__/interfaces/qlcioplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osc.dir/configureosc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osc.dir/osccontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osc.dir/oscpacketizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osc.dir/oscplugin.cpp.o -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtNetwork.framework/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
